name: Dragon Bloom
description: Warm fiery bilaterally-symmetric feathered feedback bloom — a faithful port of the Milkdrop preset `$$$ Royal - Mashup (220)`'s render loop (butterchurn-replicated: no-decay custom warp + R→G→B colour transfer + waves composited normal-alpha on top, comp-stage echo/gamma/invert) on Phosphene's mv_warp, uplifted with stem separation (three tumbling spectral strands ← drums/bass/vocals — each arm is an instrument), bass breathing, per-arm transient flares, an energy-weighted tumble, and a comp-stage beat pump. See docs/presets/DRAGON_BLOOM_PLAN.md + D-137/D-138.
author: Matt
